family.name: BottomSheet

slots.name: dragHandle
slots.note: pill drag handle en top (M3 pattern)

exclusions: State=collapsed + footer visible (collapsed muestra solo peek)

ariaAttributes: Modal: role='dialog' + aria-modal='true' + aria-labelledby='[header-id]' + focus trap
Standard: role='region' + aria-label='[propósito]' — NO focus trap
Drag handle: role='slider' + aria-valuemin=0 + aria-valuemax=100 + aria-valuenow=[percentage] (M3 pattern)
Escape cierra modal; swipe-to-dismiss tiene keyboard equivalent (buttons)
keyboardNav: Modal: focus trapped, Tab cycles, Escape cierra
Drag handle con slider role: Arrow Up/Down cambia snap point
a11y.focusTechnique: focus al primer focusable del content en open; return al trigger al close

componentDescriptions.BottomSheet:
Overlay mobile desde bottom con snap points. Variant: modal (scrim + focus trap + swipe-dismiss) / standard (non-modal, coexiste con content). State: collapsed (peek) / half-expanded / expanded. Sizes: sm/md/lg.

🔑 ARIA:
• Modal: role='dialog' + aria-modal
• Standard: role='region'
• Drag handle: role='slider' con aria-valuenow
• Focus trap solo en modal

⌨️ Keyboard:
• Escape cierra (modal)
• Arrow keys en drag handle cambian snap point

🎯 Focus:
• M3 spec completo: peek → half → expanded
• Nested scrolling: sheet expande antes que content scrollee

Tokens: 16, prefijo bs-.
WCAG 2.2 AA.

Scope: mobile primarily (viewport <768px). En desktop usa Modal o Drawer.
Solo M3 tiene spec completo; 5/6 T1 lo omiten. Carbon y Polaris argumentan que mobile debe ser full-screen.

Swipe-to-dismiss SIEMPRE debe tener equivalente keyboard (close button).

_decisions.why: Modal bloquea background con scrim; Standard coexiste (ej. map behind location list). M3 es único T1 con spec completo; replicamos la distinción fundamental.
Peek (ver algo sin abrir), half (quick browse), expanded (full interaction). M3 progressive disclosure canonical pattern.
M3 drag handle es primary affordance. role='slider' con aria-valuenow permite keyboard control de snap points (equivalent a swipe).
Solo M3 y Ant (como bottom Drawer) implementan. 4/6 T1 lo omiten. Polaris/Carbon argumentan que mobile debe ser full-screen. Documentar scope explícito.
